world.title: 2 Ships From Iran Ports Slip Past US Blockade, Cross Hormuz: Report
world.summary: Two ships from Iranian ports successfully navigated the Strait of Hormuz on Monday, despite a US military blockade. Maritime tracking firm Kpler reported that the Liberia-flagged bulk carrier Christianna was among the vessels that crossed the strategic waterway. This incident highlights ongoing tensions in the region and the challenges faced by the US in enforcing its maritime restrictions.

world.title: Xi Pushes 4-Point Peace Plan For Middle East, Promises To Help Boost Security
world.summary: Chinese President Xi Jinping has proposed a four-point peace plan for the Middle East, aiming to enhance regional security. This announcement coincides with ongoing discussions between the US and Iran regarding potential negotiations before an expiring ceasefire, following unsuccessful talks in Pakistan. The proposal reflects China's increasing involvement in Middle Eastern diplomatic efforts amid rising tensions.

world.title: US, Iran to begin next round of talks likely this week or next
world.summary: The United States and Iran are expected to resume talks this week or early next week, according to Pakistani and Iranian officials. A proposal has been sent to US President Donald Trump for delegations to return to Islamabad for discussions. Iranian officials have shown willingness to engage, while Pakistani officials are facilitating the dialogue process.

business.title: VW Taigun Facelift Launch Price Rs 11 Lakh - 40 New Updates, 8-Speed Auto
business.summary: Volkswagen has launched the Taigun facelift in India, starting at Rs 11 lakh. The SUV is available in six trim levels, featuring two engine options and nine color choices. This update includes 40 new enhancements and an eight-speed automatic transmission. The Taigun aims to compete in the C Segment SUV market, which ranges from 4.2m to 4.5m in length.

business.title: New Renault Duster First Owner In India Handed Key By Global CEO - Delivery Starts
business.summary: Renault India has begun nationwide deliveries of the new Duster, signaling the SUV's return to the Indian market. The first delivery took place in Chennai, where the global CEO handed over the keys to the inaugural owner. This event marks a significant milestone for Renault as it re-establishes the Duster in India, enhancing its product lineup.

business.title: RBI sets SGB premature redemption for 15 April: Check profit on 10 units
business.summary: The Reserve Bank of India (RBI) has scheduled the early redemption of the Sovereign Gold Bond (SGB) 2019-20 Series-V for April 15, 2026. Investors can redeem their bonds at a price of ₹15,009 per unit. This announcement provides an opportunity for holders of this tranche to access their investment before the original maturity date.

technology.title: Apple’s imaginary foldable is already beating Samsung in North America, on paper
technology.summary: Analysts predict that Apple's anticipated foldable iPhone, although not yet announced, will surpass Samsung's foldable devices in North America by the end of 2026. Despite the lack of official information, market watchers express confidence in Apple's potential to lead the premium segment. This speculation highlights the strong expectations surrounding Apple's future innovations in the foldable smartphone market.

technology.title: Is ‘Red’ colour making comeback on iPhone 18 Pro ? Check how it can make impact on sales
technology.summary: Apple is reportedly testing a deep red finish for the iPhone 18 Pro, which would be the first time a Pro model is available in this color. The introduction of a red variant could potentially influence sales positively, appealing to consumers seeking unique options. This development highlights Apple's ongoing strategy to diversify its product offerings and attract a broader audience.

technology.title: Realme Narzo 100 Lite 5G Launches in India With Impressive Budget Features
technology.summary: Realme has launched the Narzo 100 Lite 5G in India, priced under ₹15,000. The smartphone features a 7000mAh battery, a 144Hz display, and is powered by the Dimensity 6300 chipset, targeting budget-conscious consumers. The first sale is scheduled for April 21st at 12 PM, marking the debut of the new Narzo 100 series.

sports.title: IPL switch leads to two-year PSL ban for Zimbabwe’s Muzarabani
sports.summary: Zimbabwe fast bowler Blessing Muzarabani has received a two-year ban from the Pakistan Super League (PSL) after switching from Islamabad United to the Indian Premier League's Kolkata Knight Riders. The decision follows Muzarabani's agreement to play for Islamabad United, which led to disciplinary action by the Pakistan Cricket Board. The ban underscores the consequences of contractual breaches in cricket.

sports.title: IPL 2026: Fan gives Kavya Maran a rose after SRH win - what she did next goes viral - WATCH
sports.summary: The Sunrisers Hyderabad celebrated a commanding victory in the IPL, led by captain Ishan Kishan and standout players Praful Hinge and Sakib Hussain. Following the win, a fan presented a rose to team owner Kavya Maran, whose reaction quickly went viral. The jubilant atmosphere included cheers from the dugout and staff, highlighting the team's successful performance.

sports.title: PSL imposes a two-year ban on Muzarabani
sports.summary: The Pakistan Super League (PSL) has imposed a two-year ban on Zimbabwean fast bowler Blessing Muzarabani. The ban follows Muzarabani's decision to withdraw from his contract with Islamabad United in order to participate in the Indian Premier League (IPL) with Kolkata Knight Riders (KKR). This decision has resulted in significant consequences for his participation in the PSL.

health.title: 1-YO Son of Blind College Football Player Completes Eye Cancer Treatment
health.summary: Jake Olson, a blind college football player, has faced significant challenges since losing his eyesight as a child. His one-year-old son, Rowan, recently completed treatment for a rare eye cancer. The family's journey highlights resilience and hope amid adversity, showcasing their determination to overcome obstacles and inspire others facing similar battles with health issues.

health.title: Liver Transplants Can Cost Rs 20-35 Lakh: Why Adequate Health Cover Matters More Than Ever
health.summary: Liver transplants in India can cost between Rs 20 lakh and Rs 35 lakh in private hospitals, encompassing surgery and ICU care. This significant expense poses a financial burden on families, highlighting the importance of adequate health insurance coverage. As liver transplants are critical for survival, ensuring financial preparedness is essential for those facing such medical needs.

health.title: Scientists Convert Plastic to Parkinson's Drug in First
health.summary: Scientists have successfully converted discarded plastic into a drug used to treat Parkinson's disease. This innovative process addresses the environmental issue of plastic waste, which often breaks down into harmful microplastics. The research highlights the potential for recycling plastics into valuable pharmaceuticals, offering a dual benefit of reducing environmental impact while contributing to medical advancements in treating neurodegenerative diseases.

science.title: Parrots don’t just mimic humans, they actually ‘talk’ to each other: Study
science.summary: A recent study reveals that parrots communicate with each other in a complex manner, beyond merely mimicking human speech. Researchers found that these birds use vocalizations to convey messages among themselves, indicating a level of social interaction and communication previously underestimated. This discovery enhances the understanding of avian intelligence and social behavior, highlighting the cognitive abilities of parrots.

science.title: Artemis II astronaut’s emotional reunion with dog melts hearts after lunar mission - video goes viral
science.summary: NASA astronaut Christina Koch experienced an emotional reunion with her dog following her return from the Artemis II lunar mission. The 10-day mission was a notable achievement in space exploration, but it was the heartfelt homecoming that garnered widespread attention. A video of the reunion went viral, attracting millions of views and eliciting warm reactions from viewers worldwide.

science.title: Antarctica's Most Vulnerable Regions Called "The Nightmare Scenario" Have Reached a Melting Phase with No Point of Return
science.summary: Scientists have determined that certain regions of Antarctica, referred to as "The Nightmare Scenario," have entered a melting phase beyond recovery. Research indicates that the ice beneath West Antarctica has been retreating for decades, and the world has now reached the critical temperature threshold that triggers irreversible collapse. This finding raises concerns about future sea-level rise and climate impacts.

entertainment.title: Love Insurance Kompany Box Office Day 4: Only 42.5% Budget Recovery
entertainment.summary: Pradeep Ranganathan's film Love Insurance Kompany is experiencing a disappointing box office performance, recovering only 42.5% of its budget by day four. The film, which follows the success of his previous works Dragon and Dude!, is projected to have a low week ahead. Monday's numbers indicate that it is struggling to attract audiences in theaters.

entertainment.title: Dacoit Box Office Day 4: Adivi Sesh Loses The Battle To Pradeep Ranganathan - Is There A Redemption Arc Left?
entertainment.summary: Adivi Sesh's film Dacoit is struggling at the box office after a disappointing opening weekend. The movie faced significant competition from the Tamil film LIK, impacting its earnings further. By day four, Dacoit showed signs of decline, raising questions about its potential for recovery. The film's performance has not met expectations, marking a challenging period for Sesh.

entertainment.title: Varun Dhawan is feuding online with influencer who accused him of faking reviews for Hai Jawani Toh Ishq Hona Hai
entertainment.summary: Varun Dhawan is engaged in an online dispute with an influencer who alleged he faked reviews for his film "Hai Jawani Toh Ishq Hona Hai." The influencer claimed she was approached for her review of the film's first look. Dhawan's response to the accusation has sparked further discussion on social media regarding authenticity in film promotions.
